mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate reduces the equity discount rate and supports risk appetite, so sustained rate cuts should be followed by positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of months with a 3-month decline in FEDFUNDS, or if walk-forward Rank IC stays below 0.03 for any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates and FEDFUNDS remains very low, real policy rates fall further negative and investors expect continued accommodation, which should lift equity multiples over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation rises above its prior 6-month median while FEDFUNDS stays below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not improve 20d SPX returns relative to unconditional baseline by at least 2 percentage points, or if the signal is negative in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE signals weakening household income growth and slower demand, which should translate into lower equity prices over the next month as earnings expectations are cut.
failure_condition: Reject if 20d forward SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of months when UNRATE rises year-over-year, or if the negative effect disappears in a 3-year rolling evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in HOUST above recent trend reflects strong housing demand and broad cyclical momentum, which should support cyclicals and lift the index over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its 6-month moving average by at least 8%
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered set fails to outperform baseline 60d returns by at least 1.5 percentage points, or if the hit rate is below 52% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: If RSAFS is expanding while UNRATE is falling, sales growth is being met by improving labor-market conditions, indicating healthy end-demand that should raise forward equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined RSAFS growth / UNRATE decline condition does not produce positive 20d returns in at least 60% of cases, or if either leg alone explains the signal equally well.

mechanism_narrative: Improving INDPRO indicates stronger industrial output and capacity utilization, which supports revenue expectations and should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the signal does not outperform unconditional 5d returns by at least 1 percentage point, or if the direction turns negative in a majority of triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 growth slows while UNRATE rises, the economy is entering a late-cycle deceleration that compresses earnings expectations and lowers equity prices over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 year-over-year growth falls below its prior 4-quarter average and UNRATE is above its 12-month low by 0.5pp
failure_condition: Reject if the joint slowdown condition fails to produce negative 60d SPX returns in at least 55% of triggered cases, or if the interaction term adds no predictive value beyond GDPC1 alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in PAYEMS combined with higher UNRATE reflects labor-market deterioration that weakens consumption and corporate revenues, so S&P 500 returns should be negative over the next month.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls for 3 consecutive months and UNRATE rises by at least 0.2pp over the same span
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations show positive 20d SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the combined labor signal has no incremental explanatory power over UNRATE alone.
